title: festuca glacialis subsp. prudhommei
intro: Festuca glacialis subsp. prudhommei, also known as Prudhomme's blue grass, is a rare alpine plant species that belongs to the grass family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Festuca glacialis subsp. prudhommei include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Festuca glacialis subsp. prudhommei include teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the dried plant material in hot water.
